# Telluride Spray Foam

> Premium spray foam insulation for mountain homes and cabins in Telluride, CO and the surrounding San Miguel County area.

## Business

Telluride Spray Foam is a high-altitude spray foam insulation contractor specializing in thermal barrier solutions engineered for Colorado's extreme alpine climate at 8,750+ feet elevation.

- **Phone:** (970) 555-0192
- **Email:** hello@telluridesprayfoam.com
- **Address:** 456 Mountain Village Blvd, Telluride, CO 81435
- **Website:** https://sprayfoaminsulationtelluride.com

## Services

- Open cell spray foam insulation — flexible air seal for interior walls and sound dampening
- Closed cell spray foam insulation — highest R-value per inch with integrated moisture barrier
- Attic insulation — stops heat loss and prevents ice dams in mountain winters
- Crawl space encapsulation — sealed protection for air quality and structural integrity
- New construction insulation — custom-engineered thermal envelopes for mountain architecture
- Retrofit and renovation insulation — upgrading older homes to modern energy standards

## Service Areas

Telluride, Mountain Village, Ophir, Rico, Placerville, Sawpit, and all of San Miguel County, Colorado.

## Expertise

- High-altitude spray foam application (8,750 ft+)
- R-49+ rated closed cell systems
- SPFA certified technicians
- Vapor barrier and moisture control
- Energy efficiency — up to 50% heating cost reduction
- Zero air infiltration building envelope

## About

Protecting mountain homes with precision spray foam since 2012. SPFA certified, fully insured, and locally operated in the Telluride basin.
